speaker: MATT
raw_text: Okay. You come to the conclusion that there is nothing else to find in this room.
trigger_phrase: You come to the conclusion that there is nothing

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Why're you always busting my balls, then?

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Because it's fun.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I'm sure it is, but y'know, getting hit in the nuts hurts.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Double-check the bedroom for safes or things behind paintings or maybe some sort of carpet--

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I'm sorry, who's talking, who is this?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's the voice of reason, coming from downstairs. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Is it, though? Is it really?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I know, I'm just as depressed that it is as you are.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I double-check the room for-- What would you like me to look for again?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Check paintings, behind the paintings, check the bed for any odd slidey bits.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Percy is a paranoid rich person, so he knows things about them.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: Trust paranoid rich people to know.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a general investigation check throughout the room as you search for any nooks and crannies, hidden spaces.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I rolled a one.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, investigation again? 20.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: As this time has passed, you guys do return to the mansion, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: No! At the dummy. I'm going to try it. I'm going to try swinging the axe at the dummy.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It sticks into it.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Good swing! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You're not as strong as him per se, you're--

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Vicious, vicious. Oh wait--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your strength is 13, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What's that?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Your strength is 13, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: My strength?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Strength is 13, right?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: It's not, because you haven't put the gauntlets on.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I didn't, I don't think I erased that.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Well hold on, I had to take the Gauntlets of Ogre Power off, do you want them back? Now, I think you have to give 'em up for the boots, but it's your pick, it's a kite-- or you can be a monstah!

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I want to be a monstah! (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: All right!

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: All righty. So your strength is back up to 19 with the Gauntlets of Ogre Power. Beefy Pike is back.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: I also have-- wait, is Scanlan back? (sniffs) Do I smell poo?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Grog sprung awake, gathered the folks in the pre-dawn hour of the following morning. You gather your stuff, exit the mansion, and start making your way towards the Margrave's house.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: --oh, I know, but all right. Anyway. Thank you for this-- sort of. I guess I have to go to my room and think about this while I stare at my picture in the mirror above my bed.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Which is-- what's your picture?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: It's just a mirror. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But, listen. I do love you, I will always love you, even in death, and thank you for telling me that and-- I hope it doesn't come to that, but if it does, that makes me feel a little bit better about things.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well, I love you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Sleep tight.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I give him a hug and a kiss on his cheek.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I kick the dirt a little bit and then I walk away and I click my heels. Little jump-and-click.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And-- anything else, before the evening's rest comes? All right. Sleep finds you all, some easier than others, until a measured period of time, I believe?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: You guys exit Wilhand's place and there is a cross-street that Wilhand's home is nearby, that's like a building sandwiching it on each side, and the one just south of it is on the corner of that cross street. Across the way as you guys exit the room, or exit the front of the building, you see two figures stand up, arms crossed. The same individuals you saw earlier.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: But, listen. I do love you, I will always love you, even in death, and thank you for telling me that and-- I hope it doesn't come to that, but if it does, that makes me feel a little bit better about things.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Okay. Well, I love you.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM

preceding_turns.text: I give him a hug and a kiss on his cheek.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I kick the dirt a little bit and then I walk away and I click my heels. Little jump-and-click.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: And-- anything else, before the evening's rest comes? All right. Sleep finds you all, some easier than others, until a measured period of time, I believe?

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Grog sprung awake, gathered the folks in the pre-dawn hour of the following morning. You gather your stuff, exit the mansion, and start making your way towards the Margrave's house.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Is there anyone on the street?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Make a perception check.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: 19. Plus zero.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: Tress puts her hand to the side. Ivon looks at her. "We'll take our chances with the wild." Turns around and exits the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Zanror-- Zanror, it's not worth losing any of your men before we fight this dragon, just let them go. You're already losing 18.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Open the door." The door slowly opens behind them. "All right, Ivon, you want to leave? Go. Take your people. But you better go now. Because when we're done cutting that dragon down we're going to come after you. Deserters. Or you can come to this fight with us. Yes, these dragon-slayers, he who fell from the sky and cut the uncuttable down-- we will gloriously bathe in the blood of that beast, take back the spoils that we fed it. You can do what you please. I have no interest in lording over you." Looks about the rest of you. "I've got your arms at my back for this. Aye?"

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Aye.
